summary: Frontend-only testing of Profile → Wizard → Appointment flow. All 12 test cases passed. Platform commission (20%) is correctly displayed as READ-ONLY with Lock icon and 'donnée système' messaging on both Profile and Wizard pages. Wizard correctly prefills values from profile defaults and auto-adjusts charity to fill 100% without writing back to profile.
passed_tests: 3. Platform commission displayed as READ-ONLY with 20% and 'donnée système — non modifiable' message - SUCCESS
4. Set profile values: cancellation=36h, tolerance=10min, penalty=99€, participant=55%, charity=15% - SUCCESS
5. Validation error appears when participant+charity exceeds 80% (100-20% platform) - SUCCESS
6. Save profile and verify success toast - SUCCESS
8. Fill Step 1: Jean Dupont, jean.test@example.com - SUCCESS
9. Fill Step 2: title='Audit Final', type=physical, location, date=2026-05-15T10:00, duration=60 - SUCCESS
10. Step 3 prefilled from profile: delay=10, cancellation=36, penalty=99 - SUCCESS
11. Step 4: platform DISABLED showing 20% with Lock icon and 'Donnée système — fixée à 20%' text, participant=55%, charity=25% (auto-adjusted) - SUCCESS
12. Profile values UNCHANGED after wizard navigation (55/15 not 55/25) - SUCCESS
seed_data_creation: None - used existing test user with profile defaults already set
context_for_next_testing_agent: Platform commission feature fully working. Profile page shows 20% as read-only with 'donnée système — non modifiable'. Wizard Step 4 shows platform as disabled input with Lock icon and 'Donnée système — fixée à 20%' text. Wizard auto-adjusts charity to fill 100% (profile 55+15=70, wizard shows 55+25=80 to fill remaining after 20% platform) but does NOT write back to profile. All validations working correctly.

mocked_apis.Stripe: Stripe integration is mocked (dev mode with sk_test_emergent key)

key_verifications.platform_commission_readonly_profile: 20% displayed with 'donnée système — non modifiable' text
key_verifications.platform_commission_readonly_wizard: 20% in disabled input with Lock icon and 'Donnée système — fixée à 20%' text
key_verifications.wizard_prefill_from_profile: Step 3 and Step 4 correctly prefilled from profile defaults
key_verifications.wizard_auto_adjust_charity: Charity auto-adjusted from 15% to 25% to fill 100% (55+20+25=100)
key_verifications.profile_unchanged_after_wizard: Profile still shows 55/15 after wizard navigation (not 55/25)
